content.json:
# AI Gateway Billing Dashboard

This workbook shows token usage, cost projections, and consumer activity from the AI Gateway APIM policies.

**Metric source**: `llm-emit-token-metric` policy → Application Insights custom metrics (namespace: `AIGateway`)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith "AIGateway"
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by SubscriptionId, bin(timestamp, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Token Usage Over Time (by Consumer)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith "AIGateway"
| extend SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by SubscriptionId
| top 10 by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Top Consumers by Token Usage

content.query:
let cost_per_1k_prompt = 0.01;
let cost_per_1k_completion = 0.03;
customMetrics
| where name startswith "AIGateway"
| extend
    SubscriptionId = tostring(customDimensions["Subscription ID"]),
    TokenType = name
| summarize Tokens = sum(value) by SubscriptionId, TokenType, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend EstimatedCost = case(
    TokenType has "Prompt", Tokens / 1000.0 * cost_per_1k_prompt,
    TokenType has "Completion", Tokens / 1000.0 * cost_per_1k_completion,
    0.0)
| summarize
    TotalTokens = sum(Tokens),
    TotalCost = sum(EstimatedCost)
    by SubscriptionId, bin(timestamp, 1d)
| order by timestamp desc, TotalCost desc
content.title: Daily Cost Estimate per Consumer

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith "AIGateway"
| extend
    OperationId = tostring(customDimensions["Operation ID"]),
    ApiId = tostring(customDimensions["API ID"])
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(value) by ApiId, OperationId
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Tokens by API Operation

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name startswith "AIGateway"
| extend ClientIP = tostring(customDimensions["Client IP"])
| summarize
    Requests = dcount(timestamp),
    TotalTokens = sum(value)
    by ClientIP
| order by TotalTokens desc
content.title: Usage by Client IP
